schema_version.description: Version of the CLI JSON output contract.

subcommand.description: CLI subcommand that produced this object.

model_id.description: Public model identifier bound into the verifier key.

checkpoint_hash.description: Canonical checkpoint hash used for key generation.

key_hash.description: SHA-256 digest of the emitted VIKY verifier-key envelope.

key_size_bytes.description: Size of the emitted verifier-key envelope in bytes.

output.description: Destination path where the VIKY verifier-key envelope was written.

seed.description: Deterministic key-generation seed supplied by the caller.

commitllm_revision.description: Full CommitLLM git revision used for key generation.

commitllm_pin.description: Short CommitLLM pin exposed in buyer-facing CLI output.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings emitted during key generation.
